subject: [PATCH 9/9] fuse: set iomap backing device block size

reviews.author: Joanne Koong
reviews.summary: Raised questions about responsibility for setting iomap block size, suggesting it should be handled by the fuse server.

reviews.author: Darrick J. Wong
reviews.summary: Clarified that fuseblk only works with a single block device, and users may have sufficient privilege to open the bdev O_EXCL but not necessarily CAP_SYS_ADMIN.

2026-06-05.patch_summary: The patch sets the iomap backing device block size for fuse, but raises questions about responsibility and privilege.
